description: Perform a technical analysis markup on the MSFT Daily chart for 2023 to identify the major trend channel and retracement levels. Draw an Andrews Pitchfork using Pivot A (January 6, 2023), Pivot B (July 18, 2023), and Pivot C (October 26, 2023) as anchors. Apply Fibonacci Retracements from Pivot A to Pivot B to measure the correction and save the workspace to persist the analysis.
